summary: Discovered 9 verified official Monash sources covering AI assessment policy, responsible use guidance, AI statements, AI acknowledgement requirements, responsible and ethical use guidance, AI policies and guidelines hub, graduate research GenAI guidance, and Microsoft Copilot guidance. Rejected 4 sources: research publication (research_showcase_only), teaching community blog (event_or_news_only), library citation guide (low_policy_specificity), GenAI services page (inaccessible/403).
